title: Simple HTTP GET Client
description: Build a simple HTTP GET client using std::net::TcpStream that can connect to a server, send an HTTP request, and parse the response headers and body.
requirements: Connect to a host on port 80 using TcpStream
Send a properly formatted HTTP/1.1 GET request
Read the full response from the server
Parse the response into status code, headers, and body
Handle connection errors gracefully with Result
hints: Use TcpStream::connect("host:80") to establish a TCP connection
Use Connection: close header so the server closes the connection after responding
The status code is the second token on the first line of the response
bonusChallenge: Add HTTPS support using the native-tls crate. Support following redirects (301/302). Add timeout handling.
